name: HiDream-O1-Image
summary: open-source 8B pixel-native image model — single checkpoint handles text-to-image, image editing, and subject-driven personalization up to 2,048×2,048; MIT-licensed, debuted at #8 on the Artificial Analysis Text-to-Image Arena and is now the top open-weights image model

name: GPT-Realtime-2 + Voice API
summary: three voice models in the API — GPT-Realtime-2 brings GPT-5-class reasoning and 128K context to live speech-to-speech, GPT-Realtime-Translate covers 70 input / 13 output languages, GPT-Realtime-Whisper streams transcription; $32/M audio input, built for production voice agents

name: GitHub Spec Kit
summary: open-source toolkit for spec-driven development — turns vague prompts into a four-phase workflow (Specify → Plan → Tasks → Implement) that runs against Claude Code, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and 30+ other agents; free, MIT, hit 90K+ stars in days

name: GPT-5.5 Instant
summary: ChatGPT's new default model — 52.5% fewer hallucinations, 30% shorter responses, and personalization from past chats, files, and connected Gmail; live for all ChatGPT users and as chat-latest in the API

name: Grok 4.3 + Custom Voices
summary: always-on reasoning, 1M-token context, and API prices cut 40–60%; Custom Voices clones a user's voice from ~1 minute of audio behind a consent gate, with voice-agent pricing at $0.05/min — well below comparable speech-to-speech APIs

name: Mistral Medium 3.5 + Le Chat Work Mode
summary: open-weights 128B dense model (modified MIT) folding chat, reasoning, coding, and vision into one checkpoint — 256K context, configurable reasoning effort, 77.6% on SWE-Bench Verified; powers the new Work mode in Le Chat and remote async agents in Mistral Vibe

name: Midjourney V8.1
summary: image gen update — HD mode 3x faster and 3x cheaper than V8.0, standard renders 50% faster and 25% cheaper, brings back image prompts and adds a Prompt Shortener; live on midjourney.com and Discord

name: Gemini File Generation
summary: the Gemini app can now turn a prompt into a downloadable Google Doc, Sheet, Slide, PDF, DOCX, XLSX, CSV, LaTeX, RTF, or Markdown file — bridges brainstorm-to-ship for solo builders without leaving the chat; rolled out globally to all Gemini users
